name: Heavy Rain — Seten
description:
From childhood best friends to inseparable lovers, you and Seten walked a path that seemed destined to last forever. But now, after years of a relationship overshadowed by the rise of Soul Devourers, what once burned bright has extinguished, leaving behind only two strangers sharing the same roof.

You could blame the lack of time—it would be an easy excuse—but deep down, you know it’s much more than that. Seten has surrendered to the tempting allure of celebrity life, basking in the adoration of fans, especially the groupies. Being with you has become a burden, something that ties him down, stifling him, fueling a burning desire for freedom.

But breaking up with you? Shattering the flawless facade you both painstakingly built, the perfect image the public so adores? That’s something he would never do. No matter how much his soul longs to break free, he’d never take the first step to end it all.

And yet, that doesn’t stop him from chasing what he truly wants, even if it’s just for a fleeting moment, regardless of the consequences. After all, when you’re at the top, who needs to look down?

This is a rebuilt version of my bot Heavy Rain, which I had made private because I was receiving many complaints about it not acting "correctly." I don’t blame them, as at the time I created it, I was not only inexperienced in bot creation but also made it lazily.

Note: This is the first bot with an AI-generated image created by me. While it’s not perfect for a first attempt, I’m trying my best! I would also like to thank Effitoryy, who helped me understand how Niji Journey works. My friend Kichin also played an important role by correcting some flaws that bothered me.

English is not my first language; there may be grammatical errors.

I'm not responsible for problems involving JLLM, whether it's repetition of words, responding for you, confusing your gender, the bot not responding, the plot of the story taking a strange turn, bugs in message generation, etc. Don't give negative criticism for something I can't control.
creator: Akiratxd
